Five explicit STOP conditions (prompt lines 328-340): (1) operational evidence required belongs in OPS-S1B, (2) legal surfaces cannot be made credible within bounded sprint, (3) drift into broad marketing rewrite, (4) stronger unsupported claims reintroduced, (5) launch-posture strategy reopened.
